stories.title: All-Star Game Recap — AL 4, NL 0, Bellinger MVP
stories.angle: The AL dominated. The pitching was the story. And a handful of individual moments — Bellinger's RBI, Vargas's HR, Trout's leadoff — define the night.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
AL 4, NL 0.

Cody Bellinger: MVP. Dylan Cease: started for the AL.

15 strikeouts. 3 hits allowed. First All-Star Game shutout in 13 years.

The Midsummer Classic at Citizens Bank Park was completely owned by the American League.

#MLBAllStar #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The AL pitching staff last night: 11 pitchers. 3 NL hits. Zero runs. 15 strikeouts.

Juan Soto. Pete Crow-Armstrong. Otto Lopez.

That's the entire NL offensive contribution at the 2026 All-Star Game.

8th shutout in ASG history. First in 13 years.

#MLBAllStar #MLB

research.facts:
2026 All-Star Game Recap
**Facts (HIGH confidence):**
- Final score: AL 4, NL 0 — CONFIRMED (MLB.com, CBS Sports, Bleacher Report, ESPN)
- Date/Venue: July 14, 2026, Citizens Bank Park, Philadelphia — CONFIRMED
- 96th MLB All-Star Game, first ever at Citizens Bank Park — CONFIRMED
- MVP: Cody Bellinger (New York Yankees) — CONFIRMED (multiple sources)
- AL starter: Dylan Cease — CONFIRMED (CBS Sports, SI.com, multiple sources)
- NL starter: Cristopher Sanchez (Phillies) — CONFIRMED (CBS Sports, Sports Illustrated, multiple sources)
- NOTE: Prior pipeline preview listed Shota Imanaga as NL starter; multiple independent sources confirm Sanchez started
- AL first inning: 3 runs off Sanchez — CONFIRMED
- Bellinger 2-RBI single (drove in 2) — CONFIRMED (CBS Sports, Bleacher Report)
- Ben Rice drove in Bobby Witt Jr. for 3rd run — CONFIRMED (CBS Sports)
- Miguel Vargas (White Sox) solo HR in 8th inning off Justin Wrobleski — CONFIRMED (CBS Sports)
- AL combined for 3-hit shutout, 15 strikeouts — CONFIRMED (multiple sources)
- First ASG shutout in 13 years; 8th in All-Star Game history — CONFIRMED (CBS Sports)
- Three NL hits: Juan Soto (4th inning), Pete Crow-Armstrong (8th), Otto Lopez (9th) — CONFIRMED (CBS Sports)
- Mike Trout led off for AL — CONFIRMED (Yahoo Sports, CBS Sports, NBC Sports)
- Kyle Schwarber led off for NL as DH — CONFIRMED from prior pipeline
- Shohei Ohtani absent — left knee injury — CONFIRMED (prior research + multiple sources)
- Aaron Judge absent — fractured rib — CONFIRMED (prior research + multiple sources)
- Justin Verlander honored as AL Legend Pick — CONFIRMED (MLB.com, Fox Sports, Yahoo Sports)
- AL wins 4th overall lead: 48 wins to NL total — CONFIRMED (CBS Sports)

stories.title: Verlander's All-Star Farewell — The Legend Pick's Last Night
stories.angle: This was the last time Verlander will stand on an All-Star stage. 21 years. 266 wins. 3,554 strikeouts. The ceremony at CBP was his send-off.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Justin Verlander stood on the field at Citizens Bank Park last night as the AL Legend Pick.

21 seasons. 266 wins. 3,554 Ks. 3 Cy Youngs. 2 WS rings.

He's retiring after 2026. Monday night was his last All-Star Game.

HOF ballot: 2031.

#Verlander #MLB

research.facts:
Verlander Retirement / Legend Pick Farewell
**Facts (HIGH confidence):**
- Verlander named 10th All-Star as AL Legend Pick — CONFIRMED (MLB.com, Yahoo Sports)
- Verlander announced retirement following 2026 season — CONFIRMED (MLB.com, Fox Sports, Yahoo Sports)
- Age: 43 years old — CONFIRMED
- Did NOT pitch in the game; ceremonial honor only — CONFIRMED (on 60-day IL; research agent)
- Only 2026 appearance: March 30 vs. Arizona Diamondbacks — 3⅔ IP, 5 ER, 6 H, 2 BB, 1 K in 9-6 loss — CONFIRMED (Yahoo Sports)
- Career record: 266-159 — CONFIRMED (Yahoo Sports/MLB.com)
- Career ERA: 3.33 — CONFIRMED
- Career strikeouts: 3,554 — CONFIRMED
- Cy Young Awards: 3 (2011, 2019, 2022) — CONFIRMED
- World Series rings: 2 — CONFIRMED
- 2011 AL MVP — CONFIRMED
- 2006 AL Rookie of the Year — CONFIRMED (research agent/Yahoo Sports)
- Seasons: 21 — CONFIRMED
- Teams: Tigers (2x), Astros, Mets, Giants — CONFIRMED (research agent)
- HOF eligibility: 2031 — CONFIRMED
- Red carpet appearance with wife Kate Upton — CONFIRMED (OutKick/Fox News)
- Quote: "The opportunity to attend once again is something I'll cherish" — CONFIRMED from prior pipeline research
- Bryce Harper named NL Legend Pick for same game — MEDIUM (mentioned in search results alongside Verlander)

stories.title: All-Star Takeaways — Trout Homecoming, Vargas in the Spotlight, Pitching Dominance
stories.angle: Three separate stories from one night. Trout's homecoming is personal. Vargas's homer carries a team-narrative weight. The shutout is historically significant.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Three things from the 2026 All-Star Game:

1. Mike Trout led off — 12th selection, playing 40 miles from Millville, NJ.

2. Miguel Vargas hit the only HR. His White Sox are 50-45, leading the AL Central.

3. The AL threw a shutout. First in 13 years.

#MLBAllStar #MLB

article.headline: Three Things From the 2026 All-Star Game — Trout's Homecoming, Vargas's Homer, and a Historic Shutout

stories.title: Skubal Trade Deadline — Yankees and Phillies Leading, August 3 Is 19 Days Away
stories.angle: The break is done, the deadline is real. Skubal is the prize. Who blinks first?

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The All-Star break is over. The trade deadline is 19 days away.

Tarik Skubal — 2x AL Cy Young, contract year — is the prize.

Yankees and Phillies are the frontrunners. Cubs, Braves, Rays are also in the mix.

August 3 is coming fast.

#MLB #TradeDeadline

stories.title: Jordan Walker — Derby Champion, Second Half Ahead
stories.angle: The Derby moment was real — trailing 11-6, six straight to win. Now the second-half narrative begins for a 24-year-old who just had his biggest career night.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Trailing 11-6 with 3 swings left. Then Jordan Walker hit six in a row.

Walker beat Schwarber 12-11 in Philly. Won $1 million — more than his 2026 salary.

First Cardinals player to win the Derby since 1985.

Now the second half begins.

#Cardinals #MLB #HomeRunDerby

article.headline: Jordan Walker Was Losing the Home Run Derby. Then He Hit Six in a Row.

research.facts:
Jordan Walker Home Run Derby Follow-Up
**Facts (HIGH confidence):**
- Walker won 2026 Home Run Derby at Citizens Bank Park on July 13 — CONFIRMED (MLB.com, STL Today, CBS Sports, Fox News, NBC Philadelphia, UPI)
- Final: Walker defeated Schwarber 12-11 — CONFIRMED (multiple sources)
- Walker trailed 11-6 with 3 swings remaining, then hit 6 consecutive HRs (including 3 in bonus period) — CONFIRMED (research agent, multiple sources)
- First Cardinals player to win the Home Run Derby since event began in 1985 — CONFIRMED (Fox 2 Now, STL Today)
- Walker prize: $1 million — exceeded his 2026 Cardinals salary — CONFIRMED (Fox News, multiple sources)
- Schwarber runner-up: $500,000 — CONFIRMED (CBS Sports)
- Walker age: 24 years old — CONFIRMED from prior pipeline
- Walker quote: hopes Derby win inspires Black kids to play baseball — CONFIRMED (ESPN reported directly)
- Caminero hit longest single HR of the night: 491 feet (lost semis to Walker 6-5) — CONFIRMED from prior pipeline
- Harper eliminated in Round 1 (8 HR, lost to Schwarber 10) — CONFIRMED from prior pipeline
